chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI S.M.A. No. 344 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main petition. 28.10.2020 Mr. Kashif Nazeer, advocate for petitioner. ----------- Through the instant petition, petitioner Robina Kausar has prayed for the grant of Letter of Administration in respect of share in the immoveable property/asset, details whereof are mentioned in the Schedule of Property attached with the memo of petition, available at page 35, which was left by his deceased husband, namely, Abrar Ahmed s/o. Chaudhry Mukhtar Ahmed, who allegedly died on 26th August, 1997 at Toba Tek Singh, Punjab, leaving behind Robina Kausar (widow), Mubashar Abrar (son), Ayesha Abrar (daughter) and Hashmat Bibi (mother) as his legal heirs out of whom legal heir No. 4 also died on 27th January, 2014. Original Death Certificate of deceased Abrar Ahmed as well as photostat copies of Death Certificate of deceased Hashmat Bibi, Family Registration Certificate, issued by the NADRA and title documents of the immovable property are also filed at page 9, 31, 33, 45 & 46. Legal heirs No. 2 & 3 have filed their Affidavits of No-Objection for the grant of Letter of Administration in favour of the petitioner, duly sworn before Civil Judge 1st Class Magistrate at Toba Tek Singh, which are available on record. Two witnesses, namely, Tahir Aziz s/o. Ali Ahmed and Muhammad Shafqat-ur-Rehman s/o. Allah Bux have also filed their respective affidavits 2 and affirmed that there is no other legal heir of the deceased except mentioned above. Their affidavits are also available on record. Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 19th February, 2020; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Letter of Administration to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 1st October, 2020.

Their affidavits are also available on record. Notice of this petition was published in Daily “Jang” Karachi dated 19th February, 2020; however, none has filed any objection to the grant of Letter of Administration to petitioner, as per the report submitted by the Deputy Registrar (OS) on 1st October, 2020. Today petitioner and legal heir No. 2 & 3 as well as above named witnesses are present. They affirm the contents of memo of petition as well as their affidavits and also verify their signatures made thereon. Since all the legal formalities/requirements have been fulfilled, there is no impediment in grant of Letter of Administration to petitioner, therefore, the petition is allowed. The office is directed to issue Letter of Administration to the extent of share of the deceased Abrar Ahmed in the immovable property/asset shown in the Schedule of Property, as per rules. J U D G E Athar Zai
